scenario.context: Station 06 of the day run: test and document the software solution.
scenario.mission: You derive test cases, document results cleanly, and create acceptance-ready records.

station.profile: Test case derivation, test protocol, operations and user documentation
constraints: Ensure traceability from tests back to requirements

customerRequest.subject: Station 06: Testing and documentation
customerRequest.body: Please create an acceptance-ready testing and documentation status for the customer module.

questions.title: Derive test cases
questions.prompt: What should test cases primarily be derived from?

options.text: From aligned requirements and acceptance criteria
options.rationale: Direct connection to the target result.

options.text: Only from spontaneous ideas in the team

feedback.correct: Correct: Test cases have to be aligned with the target picture.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: The test-to-requirement link is mandatory.

questions.title: Acceptance-ready test documentation
questions.prompt: Which details belong in a robust test protocol? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Test case ID, inputs, and expected result
Random notes without a link to the test case
Open items with owner and due date
No dates in the test run

feedback.correct: Correct: The protocol is reproducible and actionable.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please pay more attention to structure, findings, and follow-up.

questions.title: From testing to documentation close
questions.prompt: Put the flow from test execution to documentation close in order.
items: Plan test cases against the requirements
Record the test run and findings
correctOrder: Plan test cases against the requirements
Record the test run and findings

feedback.correct: Correct: This forms a clean QA chain.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please plan and test first, then prioritize and document.

questions.title: Calculate defect rate
questions.prompt: Out of 40 test cases, 6 fail. What is the defect rate in percent?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of failing test cases correctly.

questions.title: Summarize acceptance documents
questions.prompt: Formulate in 4-6 sentences which testing and documentation artifacts are available for acceptance.
questions.expectedOutline: Available test evidence, open items, and documentation scope in a clear structure.

feedback.correct: Correct: The summary is ready for acceptance.
feedback.wrong: Please structure the test evidence, open items, and documentation more clearly.
